title: Finish Dishwasher Tablet, Ultimate Plus Infinity Shine, 105 Detergent Tablets, Lemon Sparkle, Tough on Grease, For our Most Intensive Clean & Diamond Shine, Effective for Short Eco Cycle
features: Our Most Intensive Clean & Shine: Finish Ultimate Plus Infinity Shine Dishwasher Tablets deliver 3x more cleaning power than Finish Quantum, effortlessly tackling even the toughest 48-hour dried-on stains without the need to pre-rinse
Cyclesync Technology: Releases the right ingredients to act at the right time
Protector Shield: The Protector Shield formula effectively protects your glasses, dish-decor and silverware to keep them shinier for longer
Clean Your Dishes without Pre-Rinsing: Let your dishwasher and the powerful formula of Finish Ultimate Plus Infinity Shine dishwashing detergent take care of the dirty dishes without pre-rinsing
Short Eco Cycle: With a fast-dissolving formula, these tablets activate quickly, working effectively even in short or eco cycles to save time and energy without sacrificing performance
Boost Your Dishwashing Experience: 1 - Use rinse aid for drying and spot prevention; 2 - Use dishwasher cleaner for a hygienically clean dishwasher
Finish is trusted by leading dishwasher brands like Bosch, Hisense, Siemens, Neff, and Smeg, ensuring reliable results with every wash
description: Product Description Finish Ultimate Plus Infinity Shine All in 1 Dishwashing Tablets, with Protector Shield for a superb clean and diamond shine 1st time, every time. It's our first ever tablet with CYCLESYNCTM technology, which releases the right ingredients to act at the right time. The date that can be seen on the packaging is the manufacturing date. The standard shelf life of dishwasher tablets is two years but it's best not to stockpile Finish products in case the product and its packaging deteriorates over time. Ingredients Ingredients: www.rbeuroinfo.com 15 - <30 % oxygen-based bleaching agents, 5 - <15 % non-ionic surfactants, polycarboxylates, phosphonates. Contains enzymes (Subtilisin, Amylase).Contains perfumes (benzyl benzoate, geraniol, linalool, limonene). Directions Place the Finish Ultimate Plus Infinity Shine tablets in the dishwasher's detergent dispenser, ensuring to adjust the dosage according to the dishwasher's cycle and the level of soiling on the dishes. For optimal cleaning performance, it is recommended to consult the specific usage instructions provided on the product's webpage. See more
